nasb.text: He made the veil of violet, purple, crimson and fine linen, and he worked cherubim on it.

esv.text: And he made the veil of blue and purple and crimson fabrics and fine linen, and he worked cherubim on it.

cnv.text: 所羅門又用藍色紫色朱紅色線和細麻做幔子，上面繡上基路伯。

ccb.text: 他用蓝色、紫色和朱红色的线以及细麻织成幔子，并在上面绣上基路伯天使。
